samples.prompt: A soft rounded-square badge in warm cream sits behind everything as the base shape, giving a friendly frame like a piece of paper; a thick wobbly crayon-style circle outline in coral traces just inside the badge edge, drawn slightly irregular as if hand-drawn by a child; behind the main icon, a small cluster of five short crayon-stroke rays in yellow and teal radiate from the top-left corner suggesting a sun and creative spark; centered in the badge, a stylized paintbrush tilted diagonally with a chunky wooden handle in mustard yellow and a soft teal ferrule; from the brush tip flows a bouncy ribbon-like swirl of paint in coral, teal, and yellow that curls into a small circular blob at the bottom right, like a dollop of paint pooling; a tiny five-point sparkle in white sits near the top right of the swirl to add whimsy and shine; the whole composition is centered and balanced with slightly imperfect, rounded, hand-crafted linework to feel approachable and fun for children.

samples.prompt: A soft circular badge in pale gray-blue (#E8ECEF) sits centered as the base, giving the mark a stable, coin-like foundation; behind the main figures, a simplified rising sun with three clean rays fans upward in warm orange (#F2994A) from the lower portion of the circle, symbolizing hope after crisis; in front of the sun, a simplified roofline made of two bold triangular strokes in deep blue (#1F4E79) forms a small house shape, representing shelter and home; cradling the house from below, a single open hand rendered in the same deep blue as a smooth, minimal silhouette curves upward and outward, its fingers gently spread to suggest care, support, and rescue; a thin white outline separates the hand and house from the sun and background circle to keep the composition crisp and legible at small sizes; the overall silhouette is symmetric and centered, designed to read clearly as an icon even without accompanying text.

Center a rounded amber bottle silhouette with a narrow neck and gentle shoulders, filled solid with deep forest green to root the mark in craft brewing tradition; inside the bottle, layer a concentric swirl pattern made of soft organic rings in olive-green and mustard-orange, mimicking a SCOBY culture floating in liquid; scatter three to five small circular bubbles of pale cream rising from the base toward the neck to suggest carbonation and fermentation; wrap a thin curved line across the widest part of the bottle like a label band, left unlettered but subtly textured with tiny dashes to imply craft paper; finish with a small sprig of two leaves sprouting from the bottle cap area in muted sage green, symbolizing natural, botanical ingredients; keep all shapes rounded and hand-drawn in feel, with slightly uneven, organic edges rather than perfect geometry to reinforce the artisanal, small-batch character.

samples.prompt: Center a rounded circular badge in deep charcoal (#2D2A26) as a solid backing plate to give the mark weight and contrast against the cream background; inside it, draw a simplified smoothie cup shape in soft off-white, wider at the top and tapering to a rounded base, with a thick straight straw poking out at an angle from the top left in coral (#FF6F59); fill the upper portion of the cup with a swirling spiral of color bands in mango yellow (#FFC145), coral (#FF6F59), and leafy green (#4CAF7D) to suggest whirling blended fruit; place a few small rounded dots of the same three colors scattered just above the cup rim to read as flying fruit droplets or bubbles; add a thin white rim highlight along the left edge of the cup for a glossy, fresh look; keep all shapes simple, bold, and geometric with smooth rounded corners so the mark reads clearly at small sizes.

samples.prompt: Center a soft circular backdrop in pale sky blue (#8ECAE6) representing calm and openness; within it place a simplified human head-in-profile silhouette facing right, rendered in deep slate blue (#2A4759) with a smooth, gentle outline to feel approachable rather than clinical; inside the head, instead of a solid fill, show a rising sun made of concentric warm-orange (#F4A261) arcs peeking up from the base of the skull area to symbolize hope and new beginnings; where the forehead meets the top of the head, morph the silhouette into a few open petal shapes in medium blue (#5B8FB9) that read as a small blossoming flower, symbolizing growth and self-care; beneath the head silhouette, add a simple open cupped-hand arc in the same slate blue, subtly cradling the head shape to convey support and community; keep all linework clean, rounded, and minimal with generous negative space so the mark reads clearly at small sizes.'

samples.prompt: Centered on a soft cream background, a large single hexagon outlined in deep amber forms the backbone of the mark, evoking a honeycomb cell; behind it, faint smaller hexagons tile outward at low opacity to suggest a broader honeycomb pattern without cluttering the focal shape; inside the main hexagon, a smooth golden honey drop shape sits slightly bottom-weighted, rendered in a rich gradient from warm amber at the top to deeper burnt-orange at the base, with a small rounded highlight of pale cream to give it a glossy, dripping look; a thin trail of honey drips from the bottom tip of the drop, ending in one small separate droplet beneath the hexagon for added craft detail; a simple, friendly bee silhouette in dark brown with two soft translucent wings rests atop the honey drop, wings slightly overlapping the drop's highlight to tie the elements together; the overall composition is symmetrical and iconic, balanced within the circular negative space of the hexagon, suitable for a premium specialty honey brand mark.

samples.prompt: Center a soft rounded circle badge in pale sky blue as the background shape, giving the logo a friendly coin-like frame. Behind the top of the circle, place a simple bright yellow sun with a few short rounded rays peeking over the rim to suggest a cheerful outdoor pool day. Across the lower half of the circle, layer two overlapping wave bands in teal and deeper blue, drawn as smooth rounded curves like gentle ripples of a pool. Swimming just above the waves, place a small chubby cartoon fish in coral red with a round white belly, a single dot eye, and a curved smile, tilted slightly as if mid-swim. Add a few small white bubble circles of varying size trailing behind the fish to reinforce motion through water. Finish with a slightly thicker white outline around the entire circular badge to give it a clean, sticker-like finish suitable for a kids' brand.

samples.prompt: A soft circular backdrop in pale off-white fills the canvas edge to edge, giving the mark room to breathe; centered within it, a gently curved vertical spine made of 6-7 rounded vertebra segments stacked and slightly offset to suggest an S-curve of natural alignment, rendered in deep teal-blue; a thin flowing line threads through the vertebrae like a nerve or energy path, colored in a lighter teal to suggest connectivity and wellness; an open, cupped hand shape wraps gently around the lower half of the spine from behind, rendered in warm orange, symbolizing care and adjustment; a small radiant burst of three short curved lines sits above the topmost vertebra, colored in the same warm orange, representing relief and renewed energy; the entire composition is balanced symmetrically on a vertical axis, kept simple and iconic enough to scale down for a favicon.

Center a dark navy circular backdrop that gives the mark depth and contrast against the background; inset within it, place a bold octagonal shield outline rendered in a bright violet-to-cyan gradient, evoking a controller badge or achievement icon; behind the shield, add a subtle radiating glow in cyan to suggest a screen or power-up energy; inside the octagon, place a crisp white triangular play-button arrow angled slightly forward, symbolizing gameplay and forward momentum; overlay two thin geometric notches at the top corners of the octagon styled like joystick nubs or controller buttons in cyan, adding a playful mechanical detail; finish with a thin outer ring stroke in cyan encircling the whole badge to unify the shape and give it a polished, emblematic studio-logo feel.

samples.prompt: A soft circular badge sits at the back as a pale sage-green disc, grounding the mark with a sense of wholeness and the earth. Behind the upper half of the circle, a simplified radiant sun made of three short thick rays peeks up in warm deep-green tone, symbolizing hope and growth. In the center, a large stylized leaf shape rises like a flame or sapling, its single bold vein curving upward, rendered in a rich forest-green gradient from dark at the base to bright at the tip. Beneath the leaf, two simplified cupped hand forms curve inward from left and right like a shallow bowl, rendered in a deeper teal-green, symbolizing protection, community, and stewardship cradling the leaf/sun above them. A thin circular outline traces just inside the badge edge, unifying all elements into one cohesive emblem suitable for small-scale reproduction.
